name: Chicken Chow Mein
recipeInstructions:
Note: Warm the chow mein noodles in a 325°F oven for 5 minutes.
1. Combine the sauce ingredients and set aside.
2. Add oil to a hot wok. Swirl, add garlic and stir fry for 30 seconds.
3. Add chicken. Stir fry for 3 minutes or until the chicken turns opaque. Remove and set aside.
4. Add vegetables and stir fry over medium heat for 2 minutes.
5. Push vegetables to the sides of the wok. Restir the sauce mixture and add it to the center of the wok, stirring until thick and bubbly. Return the chicken and heat.
6. Serve with chow mein noodles.
